info.title: InvoiceFlow
info.description: An API for automating invoice generation and management.

get.description: Export all invoices as CSV, Excel, or PDF.

post.description: Create a new invoice for a client owned by the authenticated user.

get.description: List invoices belonging to the authenticated user with pagination.
Retrieve a specific invoice belonging to the authenticated user.

put.description: Update a specific invoice belonging to the authenticated user.

delete.description: Delete a specific invoice belonging to the authenticated user.

get.description: List payments recorded for an invoice.

schema.title: Response List Invoice Payments Invoices  Invoice Id  Payments Get

post.description: Record a payment for an invoice. Supports partial payments.

get.description: Get the email delivery status for an invoice

post.description: Transition a draft invoice to sent and email the client.
Mark an invoice as fully paid. Creates a payment for the outstanding amount if needed.

get.description: Generate and download PDF for an invoice.
Generate and download PDF receipt for a payment.
Aggregated invoice stats for dashboard consumption.

post.description: Webhook endpoint for external payment processors to mark invoices as paid.

get.description: Export all clients as CSV, Excel, or PDF.
Search clients by name or email.

schema.title: Response Search Clients Clients Search Get

post.description: Create a new client owned by the authenticated user.

get.description: List clients belonging to the authenticated user with pagination.
Retrieve a specific client owned by the authenticated user.

put.description: Update a client owned by the authenticated user.

delete.description: Delete a client if it has no associated invoices.

get.description: Get monthly revenue breakdown for the last 12 months.
Export metrics summary as CSV, Excel, or PDF.
Get the authenticated user's business settings.

put.description: Update business settings for the authenticated user.

post.description:
Create business settings for the authenticated user.
Only creates if no settings exist.
